title: BAC Arbitration Fee Calculation
summary: Calculate Beijing Arbitration Commission institution fees, arbitrator remuneration, and total fees for five arbitration cases using staged Chinese PDF fee schedules.
taskPrompt:
You are calculating arbitration fees under the staged Beijing Arbitration Commission (BAC) materials.

## Closed-Book Rule

- Use only the staged materials under `/media/user/data/agenthle/legal/legal_dr_fees_01/base/input`.
- Do not use outside web search or external regulatory knowledge.

## Inputs

- Task brief: `/media/user/data/agenthle/legal/legal_dr_fees_01/base/input/task_brief.md`
- Case facts: `/media/user/data/agenthle/legal/legal_dr_fees_01/base/input/cases.json`
- Output contract: `/media/user/data/agenthle/legal/legal_dr_fees_01/base/input/output_contract.json`
- Document manifest: `/media/user/data/agenthle/legal/legal_dr_fees_01/base/input/document_manifest.json`
- BAC PDF documents: `/media/user/data/agenthle/legal/legal_dr_fees_01/base/input/documents`
- Optional Python runtime manifest: `/media/user/data/agenthle/legal/legal_dr_fees_01/base/input/runtime_env/pyproject.toml`
- Python 3.12 entry point: `/media/user/data/agenthle/legal/legal_dr_fees_01/base/software/python3.12`

## Your Task

Calculate, for each of the five listed cases:

- institution fee in RMB;
- arbitrator remuneration in RMB;
- total fee in RMB.

All values must be accurate to two decimal places. Case 4 has a special condition: the parties reached a settlement agreement regarding the dispute before applying for arbitration.

If you want Python PDF tooling, install/use the package manifest under `input/runtime_env/`; do not modify files under `input/`.

## Deliverable

Write exactly one JSON file here:

`/media/user/data/agenthle/legal/legal_dr_fees_01/base/output/arbitration_fee_results.json`

Follow the schema in `/media/user/data/agenthle/legal/legal_dr_fees_01/base/input/output_contract.json`. The evaluated numeric fields for each case are:

- `institution_fee_rmb`
- `arbitrator_remuneration_rmb`
- `total_fee_rmb`
agentMustDo: Use only the staged BAC source PDFs, case facts, and schema under `input/`.
Calculate the institution fee, arbitrator remuneration, and total fee for all five cases.
Report all evaluated amounts in RMB to two decimal places.
Write exactly one JSON file to `output/arbitration_fee_results.json`.
Do not modify files under `input/`; write final work only under `output/`.

inputFiles.name: task_brief.md
inputFiles.description: Agent-facing task brief and deliverable path.

inputFiles.name: cases.json
inputFiles.description: Five dispute amounts and the Case 4 settlement condition.

inputFiles.name: output_contract.json
inputFiles.description: Required output filename and case field schema.

inputFiles.name: document_manifest.json
inputFiles.description: Manifest for the seven staged BAC PDFs.

inputFiles.name: documents
inputFiles.description: Seven BAC Chinese-language PDF source documents.

inputFiles.name: python3.12
inputFiles.description: Python 3.12 entry point verified during Stage 4.

evaluation: The evaluator parses `output/arbitration_fee_results.json` and scores fifteen numeric answers: five cases times institution fee, arbitrator remuneration, and total fee. Each value must be within RMB 0.01 of the evaluator-owned answer key. Each case is worth 20 points, with 7 points for institution fee, 7 for arbitrator remuneration, and 6 for total fee; the 0-100 result is normalized to AgentHLE's 0.0-1.0 scale.

classifier.rationale: The task involves calculating arbitration fees, which falls under legal services.
